weapons.name: Pulse Cannon
weapons.description: High rate of fire, low damage per shot. Great against swarms.

weapons.name: Scatter Beam
weapons.description: Three bullets in a cone. Trades range for coverage.

weapons.name: Plasma Triad
weapons.description: Three heavy plasma bolts in a tight cone. Brutal up close.

weapons.name: Spud Missile
weapons.description: Slow-firing heavy ordnance with massive payload. Homing pending engine support — currently flies straight.

weapons.name: Tater Net
weapons.description: Wide five-shot fan that smothers a lane. Crowd control over single-target damage.

weapons.name: Tail Gunner
weapons.description: Rear-mounted turret that punishes enemies that slip past your nose.

weapons.name: Side Spitter
weapons.description: Twin sidekick pods spit bolts at 45 degrees outward. Great for clearing flanking waves.

weapons.name: Plasma Whip
weapons.description: Pinprick damage at machine-gun cadence — a near-continuous lash that melts armor over time.

weapons.name: Hailstorm
weapons.description: Five icy slugs in a wide arc. Heavy alpha strike on tight cooldown — the screen-clearer.
